svg.title: Build rhythm: Codex lifetime, site-build token rhythm, and GitHub activity
svg.desc: Build rhythm contains three independent scopes: a rounded combined Codex lifetime, a repo-scoped site-build token rhythm, and aggregate weekly GitHub activity. Combined Codex lifetime: 50.3B tokens, rounded to the nearest 0.1 billion and observed Jul 23, 2026. It is combined before publication; per-source readings and identities are not published. Provenance: automatic refresh. The approximate conversion is ~$40.1K using this site's current blended public API replay rate of 0.796655 dollars per million tokens as of 2026-07-12; it is not an actual bill. Site-build token rhythm: a repo-scoped cumulative daily estimate, separate from lifetime usage. It runs from May 22, 2026 through Jul 22, 2026 and ends at 10.1B estimated tokens. Only rounded cumulative points are published. GitHub activity, last five years at weekly grain. Totals: 3,244 commits, 32,428,621 additions, 30,956,237 deletions, and 160 active weeks. The commit axis uses log1p; the signed additions and deletions axis uses symmetric log.
svg.text: Three privacy-safe scopes, kept deliberately separate
